title: Omnigent: The New Meta-Harness for EVERY Coding Agent - Claude Code, Codex, Pi, More
summary: Omnigent is a meta-harness that enables developers to orchestrate multiple AI coding models such as Claude Code, Codex, and Pi as interchangeable workers. It allows routing tasks to different models for specific jobs like implementation and code review, includes human-in-the-loop governance, and maintains sessions across devices.
writeup: This video covers Omnigent, a meta-harness that orchestrates multiple AI coding models, including Claude Code, Codex, and Pi, as interchangeable workers. It matters because it lets developers route tasks to whichever model fits a given job, such as one model for implementation and another for code review, rather than committing to a single agent. Key takeaways: Omnigent supports model routing across agents, adds human-in-the-loop governance, and maintains sessions across devices.
